title: About Bilgiç Foundation
content:
About Bilgiç Foundation

Bilgiç Foundation was established in 2018 to bring its global experience in healthcare and technology to the world of education and research. Our foundation utilizes the international experience of the Bilgiç family in the healthcare and pharmaceutical sectors for more than 30 years to guide education and technology studies in these fields. Since its establishment, it has been working to contribute to society and to provide qualified educational opportunities to young generations, especially through health and technology-oriented education programs and projects.

One of the most important steps of the Bilgiç Foundation is the establishment of Istanbul Health and Technology University, a health and technology themed university. By establishing this university, our foundation aims to raise qualified individuals who will lead in the fields of health and technology. Istanbul University of Health and Technology offers its students a contemporary and practical education with educational programs that combine health sciences, engineering and technology disciplines. The university aims to transfer the latest innovations in the sector to its students and to develop an interdisciplinary approach by overcoming the boundaries between health and technology.

Bilgiç Foundation also plays an active role in the development of health technologies and their integration into public health. In order to encourage the use of technological innovations in the health sector, our foundation invests in projects that support health technology entrepreneurship and takes important steps in research and development. These projects aim to produce innovative solutions to improve the quality of healthcare services, make treatment processes more efficient and facilitate access to healthcare services.

In line with our health and technology themed university, our foundation aims to add value to society through the combination of these two fields. Bilgiç Foundation has an important mission to provide equal opportunities in education, accelerate the technological transformation in the health sector and support scientific research in this process. Our foundation aims to develop interdisciplinary projects in health and technology and to increase social welfare through these projects.

Bilgiç Foundation continues to increase its contributions day by day in order to raise a generation specialized in the fields of health and technology with a sense of social responsibility. With its sector experience, global vision and strong investments in education, our foundation continues to produce sustainable solutions in these fields by raising the health and technology professionals of the future.
